title: Avatar Aspect
description: There's a Fire Aspect enchantment, so why not the other elements?
body:
There's a Fire Aspect enchantment, so why not the other elements?

This pack adds 3 new enchantments:

### Air Aspect
- Launches mobs hit by the enchanted item into the air
- Has two levels, higher levels launch the target higher into the air
- Can be applied to swords and maces

### Water Aspect
- Splashes a water potion on mobs hit by the enchanted item
- Has two levels, higher levels splash more than 1 potion
- Can be applied to swords and maces

### Earth Aspect
- Places dirt on mobs hit by the enchanted item
- Has two levels, higher levels cover a larger area in dirt
- Can be applied to swords and maces
